prompt: SeraProtocolのMCPサーバーに新しいツール sera_get_chart_data を追加したい。OHLCV(ローソク足)データを返すread-onlyツールです。どのファイルをどう変更すればいい？

assertions.name: identifies_schema_file
assertions.description: Identifies schemas/index.ts as needing a new Zod schema

assertions.name: identifies_subgraph_service
assertions.description: Identifies services/subgraph.ts as needing a new query function

assertions.name: identifies_read_tools
assertions.description: Identifies tools/read-tools.ts as where to register the new tool

assertions.name: chartlogs_query
assertions.description: Includes a GraphQL query using the chartLogs entity

assertions.name: interval_type_param
assertions.description: Includes intervalType parameter with valid options (1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 1d, 1w)

assertions.name: follows_existing_patterns
assertions.description: Code follows the existing patterns in the MCP server (Zod schema, service function, tool registration)

assertions.name: ohlcv_fields
assertions.description: Mentions OHLCV fields: open, high, low, close, volume
